# HEIRCOR OP. -- SOURCE FOLDER
# H:\Import\Ouch 2026\Source\
#
# PURPOSE
# Shared landing zone for all crew-generated files, exports, and
# critical source documents. When Trip or C.B. produce a file worth
# keeping, Dan drops it here. Stan knows to look here first.
#
# Also functions as a backup location for Project Knowledge files
# in case indexing is delayed or a file needs to be re-uploaded.
#
# WHAT BELONGS HERE
# - Trip decision documents and site reviews
# - C.B. pattern reports
# - messages.json exports
# - Any file produced in a crew conversation that needs to persist
# - Backup copies of Project Knowledge files
#
# WHAT DOES NOT BELONG HERE
# - Portal source code (that lives in ouchmccouch-portal\)
# - Raw notes and archive material (that lives in Notes\Previous\)
# - Audio files (those live on J:\)
#
# CREW NOTE
# If a file exists here, it is real and it counts.
# The substrate remembers.
